raw_consumer_statement:
I initially disputed a transaction of an insurance charge that I did not subscribe. After I contact the insurance, they sent me a check to refund me the charge. So, I withdrew the dispute. However, two reversal charges were subsequently posted to my account for the same transaction, resulting in a duplicate charge of {$2100.00}.

I have been contacting Citi XXXX billing department since XX/XX/year>. The customer representative told me it should be resolved within 7 to 10 business days. The next week, on XX/XX/XXXX, I called again and found it was not processed. I gave a follow up call on XX/XX/XXXX, the issue was still there. I asked the customer representative to escalate it. Today, on XX/XX/XXXX, I called again to check the status, the customer representative said it is still under investigation. My payment date is XX/XX/XXXX. I asked the representative if I don't pay the duplicate charge, will I be charged the interest for the {$2100.00}, the representative said yes.
